title: ochrosia haleakalae
intro: Ochrosia haleakalae, also known as the Hawaiian holly, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ochrosia haleakalae include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and is also used in some commercial products, including cough syrups and herbal supplements.
